RAVI KANT PAL

Hyderabad, Telangana, India· ravi.engineer.pal@outlook.in

Senior Software Engineer (AVP) with 8.5+ years of experience bridging the gap between robust Enterprise Engineering and cutting-edge Generative AI. Expertise in building scalable full-stack systems using .NET, Python (FastAPI), and Modern JS, with a current focus on Agentic AI workflows and autonomous process automation. Proven track record in cloud-native migrations (PCF to OpenShift), CI/CD orchestration, and driving automation excellence through AI-driven testing (Playwright/MCP). Passionate about architecting intelligent systems that enhance developer productivity and system performance.

Download Resume

Experience

Senior Software Developer

Wells Fargo EGS India Pvt Ltd - HYDERABAD
  • Deployed on STARS project using .NET,C# & Angular-17, with cross functional contributor to CRIS & 1DLT team.
  • Developed and deployed Generative AI solutions utilizing Python and FastAPI for the STARS - LP assessment module, integrating Agentic workflows and RAG pipelines to automate complex enterprise banking processes.
  • Engineered an AI-driven Engineering Ecosystem by integrating JIRA-MCP and Confluence agents, enabling autonomous task tracking and automated technical documentation to reduce manual overhead.
  • Accelerated developer onboarding and environment consistency by implementing DEVInit, standardizing workspaceconfigurations and streamlining the setup for complex micro-services.
  • Modernized the testing infrastructure by integrating HEX (HyperExecute) and Playwright AI agents, cutting CI test execution time by 50% and reducing regression cycles by 40%.
  • Orchestrated a large-scale cloud migration from PCF to OpenShift, leveraging AI-assisted engineering to reduce infrastructure-related incidents by 30% and improve deployment reliability.
  • Served as a Technical SME, mentoring 3+ cross-functional teams on modern design patterns, Clean Engineering, and the strategic integration of AI agents into CI/CD pipelines.
  • Reduced MTTR (Mean Time to Resolution) by 35% through proactive incident triage and the implementation of Circuit Breaker patterns and system monitoring.
  • Enforced rigorous engineering standards through code reviews and pair programming, resulting in a 25% reduction inproduction defects and improved system maintainability.
  • Maintained CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Azure DevOps, and GitHub Actions, enabling faster, safer releases and consistent feature delivery within Agile/Scrum timelines.
November 2021 - Present

Consultant

AllState India Pvt Ltd - PUNE
  • Developed and enhanced Agent Central and Dealer Services - vehicle insurance web applications using ASP.NET, C#, Angular, and SQL Server, serving large-scale business operations.
  • Designed and developed a Floor Management application using React, Python (FastAPI), and MySQL for the Allstate Facility Team during COVID, enabling safe, rotational seat allocation for returning employees.
  • Worked closely with product owners and business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable technical solutions.
  • Delivered features and fixes with high quality in Agile sprint cycles, ensuring on-time releases.
March 2020 - September 2021

Software Developer

Coding Brains Solutions Pvt Ltd - LUCKNOW

As a software developer in a service-based organisation, I engaged with clients to define project scopes and estimate work efforts. I was responsible for end-to-end development and testing across various projects, including PaceAirFreight, CatScale, and AirlineApps.

ACME Digitek Solutions Pvt LTD - LUCKNOW

Interests

Apart from being a web developer, I enjoy most of my time being outdoors.

When forced indoors, I follow a number of sci-fi and fantasy genre movies and television shows, and I spend a large amount of my free time exploring the latest technology advancements in the front-end web development world.
